title: 2026 Vermont Governor Election
description: The 2026 race is for governor of Vermont, the state’s chief executive office. It is an open primary cycle in the sense that the general-election field has not yet been finalized, but incumbent Republican Phil Scott is already running for renomination, and Democrat Amanda Janoo has announced a challenge. Vermont has recently been a strongly Republican governor’s race despite voting heavily Democratic in federal elections, so the contest will likely center on affordability, education, taxes, and Scott’s long tenure in office.

polling.pollster: University of New Hampshire Survey Center

candidates.name: Phil Scott
candidates.summary: Phil Scott is the incumbent governor of Vermont and a longtime statewide officeholder. He has emphasized economic growth, affordability, and education reform, and he has governed as a socially moderate Republican in a state that leans Democratic in federal elections.

summary_sources.title: About the Governor | Office of Governor Phil Scott

career_history.title: Governor of Vermont
career_history.description: Serves as Vermont's chief executive; reelected to a fifth term in 2024.

career_history.title: Lieutenant Governor of Vermont
career_history.description: Served three terms before becoming governor.

career_history.title: Vermont State Senator
career_history.description: Represented Washington County; served as vice chair of the Transportation Committee and chair of the Institutions Committee.

career_history.title: Co-owner
career_history.description: Co-owned his family's construction business for more than 30 years.

candidates.name: Amanda Janoo
candidates.summary: Amanda Janoo is a Democratic candidate for governor who entered the race in 2026. Her campaign has highlighted affordability, housing, education, and health care, and she has described herself as an economist and policy expert with international experience.

summary_sources.title: Amanda Janoo for Governor of Vermont
First Democratic candidate enters governor's race - VTDigger

career_history.title: Knowledge & Policy Lead
career_history.description: Leads policy and knowledge work focused on wellbeing economy and industrial policy.

career_history.title: Economic Security and Wellbeing Fellow
career_history.description: Worked as a fellow focused on economic security and wellbeing.

career_history.title: Policy and economic development roles
career_history.description: Has worked with governments and international development institutions on participatory economic policy design.
